product_depth.justification: Index skill contains all required tables (Domain Profiles, Routing, Criteria Key Mapping, Verification Methods), pipeline diagram with 7 phases, phase routing with 5 deal types, cross-domain composability rules, and phase handoff protocol. Goes beyond minimum by including common combinations table and scope change escalation.

functionality.justification: plugin.json parses as valid JSON with all required fields (name, version, description, skills). YAML frontmatter valid with quoted description. All 5 profiles present in routing table. Criteria names match spec.md exactly. Relative paths follow consistent pattern.

visual_design.justification: Consistent markdown formatting throughout. Tables use pipe formatting with aligned columns. Pipeline diagram uses clear ASCII art. Section hierarchy follows SDLC suite reference pattern. Consistent use of backtick formatting for profile names and criteria keys.

code_quality.justification: YAML frontmatter well-formed. plugin.json follows exact structure of harness-sdlc-suite. No broken references. Consistent naming conventions (snake_case for profiles and criteria). Directory structure created for all 5 domain skills.

contract_checks.evidence: Domain Profiles table has 5 rows: sales (qualification_depth, pipeline_coverage, deal_documentation, close_readiness), sales_engineering (demo_completeness, technical_validation, solution_documentation, integration_clarity), tender_management (compliance_coverage, response_completeness, win_theme_clarity, submission_readiness), sales_enablement (content_coverage, audience_relevance, adoption_measurability, maintenance_sustainability), sales_operations (data_completeness, process_documentation, reporting_accuracy, scalability_design). All match spec.md.

Pipeline diagram shows 7 phases: Discovery & Qualification (harness-sales), Technical Validation (harness-se), Formal Procurement (harness-tm), Enablement & Readiness (harness-sen), Revenue Operations (harness-so), Negotiation & Close (harness-sales), Onboarding & Handoff (harness-sales + harness-se).
plugin.json parses as valid JSON. Contains name (harness-sales-suite), version (1.0.0), description, author, homepage, license, keywords, skills fields.

Routing table has 5 entries: sales -> ../harness-sales/SKILL.md, sales_engineering -> ../harness-se/SKILL.md, tender_management -> ../harness-tm/SKILL.md, sales_enablement -> ../harness-sen/SKILL.md, sales_operations -> ../harness-so/SKILL.md. Directories exist for all 5.
All tables use consistent pipe formatting with header separator rows.
YAML frontmatter contains name: harness-sales-suite and description in double quotes.

feature_evidence.reason: All 6 verification steps pass: plugin.json exists with correct structure, SKILL.md exists as index skill, routing table covers all 5 profiles, pipeline phases and phase routing present, criteria key mapping table complete, verification methods table covers all 5 profiles.

test_results.coverage: N/A -- documentation-only plugin, no executable code

internal_consistency.justification: Criteria names consistent across Domain Profiles table, Criteria Key Mapping table, and Verification Methods table. Profile names match routing table entries.

intentionality.justification: Sales pipeline phases map to real revenue execution stages. Deal types reflect actual sales scenarios (transactional, mid-market, enterprise RFP, strategic, channel). Security levels appropriate per deal complexity.

craft.justification: Follows SDLC suite index skill structure precisely. Tables formatted consistently. Diagram uses established ASCII art convention.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: Index skill is loadable by harness framework. domain_profile lookup routes to correct skill file. Criteria keys map to NN-eval.json primary_scores fields.
